steps.title: Fit the table
steps.content: The table includes $(0,18)$ and $(1,13)$. Enter those points and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=-5$ and $b=18$, so the equation is $y=-5x+18$. The $y$-intercept row $x=0$ also confirms $b=18$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is $y=-5x+18$, so D is correct.
